calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-13-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Irene Burns.
Steven Shorr, Esq., special appearance for Plaintiff: Neiman Marcus Division Meiman Marcus Group.
Testimony in lieu of direct testimony CCP 98 is in file.
No appearance by the Defendant: Lisa Depaolis.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff as follows:
Principal $1,056.68
Prejudgment Interest $41.69
Attorney's Fees $160.00
Costs $201.30
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Jan. 13, 2006
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2005 Set For Trial On Jan-09-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
